articles.title: Chuck Norris, ‘Walker, Texas Ranger’ star, dead at 86 - The Washington Post
articles.description: The actor and martial arts star passed away on Thursday, his family confirmed in a post on social media.
articles.content:
Chuck Norris, the actor and martial artist who played the leading role in long-running television series Walker, Texas Ranger has died, at age 86.

articles.title: Why is the 'Bachelorette' canceled? A guide to the Taylor Frankie Paul controversy - NPR
articles.description: Taylor Frankie Paul rose to fame on The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives, then filmed a season of The Bachelorette. But it won't air as planned because of resurfaced domestic violence allegations.
articles.content:
The new season of ABC's reality TV series The Bachelorette was all filmed and set to premiere on Sunday. But parent company Disney now says it will not air as planned.
